prose:
**Aniline Fukui reactivity — computed result.**

**Method used:** DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**) in the **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied XYZ used as input: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz` (14 atoms). Backend reported as `program: dft`; Mulliken charges from PySCF were used for the condensed Fukui indices. Parent state: neutral singlet; N−1 cation state: charge +1, multiplicity 2; N+1 anion state: charge −1, multiplicity 2.

**Headline result:** most electrophilic site = atom 3, C, with **f+ = 2.2975867**.

**Most nucleophilic site:** atom 1, N, with **f− = 0.20452359**.

Per-atom condensed Fukui values returned by chemkit:

| atom | element | f+ | f− | f0 | dual descriptor |
|---:|:---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| 1 | N | 1.6696628 | 0.20452359 | 0.93709321 | 1.4651392 |
| 2 | C | -1.9009183 | -0.0037260934 | -0.95232219 | -1.8971922 |
| 3 | C | 2.2975867 | 0.066571393 | 1.182079 | 2.2310153 |
| 4 | C | 2.2965637 | 0.066588805 | 1.1815763 | 2.2299749 |
| 5 | C | -0.28837103 | 0.0083458972 | -0.14001256 | -0.29671692 |
| 6 | C | -0.28784777 | 0.0083790983 | -0.13973433 | -0.29622687 |
| 7 | C | 1.4031744 | 0.10973255 | 0.7564535 | 1.2934419 |
| 8 | H | -0.35138763 | 0.08199599 | -0.13469582 | -0.43338362 |
| 9 | H | -0.35134383 | 0.082013935 | -0.13466495 | -0.43335777 |
| 10 | H | -0.82107487 | 0.076354671 | -0.3723601 | -0.89742955 |
| 11 | H | -0.82130627 | 0.0763456 | -0.37248033 | -0.89765187 |
| 12 | H | -0.34268953 | 0.087365768 | -0.12766188 | -0.4300553 |
| 13 | H | -0.75088374 | 0.067758118 | -0.34156281 | -0.81864186 |
| 14 | H | -0.75116473 | 0.067750673 | -0.34170703 | -0.81891541 |

**Integrity:** chemkit returned `integrity.trustworthy: true`.

**Warnings:** no `warnings` array was returned by the tool. Integrity checks returned the following details verbatim:
- `sum(f+) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)`
- `sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)`
- `common header present`

**Artifacts / reproducibility:** plot written to `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/aniline/argo_gpt-5.5/20260704-175020_aniline_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png`. Exact command reported by chemkit: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 --stdout path --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp0eaqq17v/live.json`. The chemkit result did not include a live `.out` log path, so I am not inventing one.
